arts.sum: “I can’t imagine Joe Gelhardt leaving Leeds United and wanting to go and play in League One, although Wrexham are near the top of the league. Carlton Palmer is urging Leeds United manager Daniel Farke to allow Joe Gelhardt to leave Elland Road in the January transfer window

arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer chance emerges as Derby County 'keen' to sign player who wowed Jurgen Klopp
arts.sum: Danns junior, a striker, has yet to make a senior appearance for Arne Slot's Premier League table-toppers - having made five outings in the previous campaign which included a two-goal showing against Southampton in the FA Cup. It was after that game that Slot's predecessor, Jurgen Klopp, praised Danns for scoring a superb chipped finish to open his account for the Reds before following-up on a rebound to double his tally. Danns, whose Reds team-mate Nat Phillips is already on loan at the Rams, would add another option up front to Paul Warne's squad if indeed he does sign for the club.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne: I’m confident Derby can beat Leeds United
arts.sum: Derby County boss Paul Warne is feeling confident of his side’s chances of picking up another scalp this week at Pride Park as Leeds United face the Rams. Warne has previewed the Leeds clash this week, in which he has discussed how confident he’s feeling of seeing off the Whites and collecting another impressive scalp after a 2-1 victory over West Brom most recently.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke expects “surprise” as Leeds United prepare for Derby County today
arts.sum: Leeds United take on Derby County this evening looking to round off the calendar year with a third successive win, having won at Stoke on Boxing Day. Leeds swept Paul Warne’s Rams to the side with ease when they met on the 7th of December, but the contrast between home and away form for both sides means that Pride Park should play host to a much different contrast tonight.
